definition: Spotify track popularity score (0-100), reflecting recent streaming activity on the platform. NOT an indicator of artistic quality.
The target variable for regression. Represents the track's popularity at time of data collection.
The model's estimated popularity score. Not a guarantee of actual popularity.
The model selected as best performer on validation set. Currently XGBoost (EXP24-XGB-FINAL-001).
Second-best model available as fallback. Currently Random Forest.
One of 18 original fields from the Spotify API track metadata.
One of 31 features after Feature Engineering (FS23-SELECTED), including original and derived features.
One of 49 features in the final model matrix after One-Hot Encoding and transformations.
Temporal validation set (2005-2013, 85,272 rows) used for model selection and hyperparameter tuning.
Held-out temporal test set (2014-2021, 85,876 rows) used ONLY for final performance evaluation. Never used for model selection.
Difference: actual - predicted. Convention: positive residual = underprediction.
Model predicts lower than actual popularity. Residual > 0.
Model predicts higher than actual popularity. Residual < 0.
SHAP value quantifying a feature's contribution to a specific prediction relative to the expected value. Explains MODEL BEHAVIOR, not real-world causation.
Variation in model performance across different time periods. Status: MODERATELY_VARIABLE.
Semantic version of the trained model artifact (currently 1.0.0). Distinct from package version.
Semantic version of the processed dataset (currently 1.0.0). Distinct from model version.
Semantic version of the deployment package (currently 2.7.0). Distinct from model version.
